basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation is relaxed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female applicants and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech with valid GATE or M.E./M.Tech in relevant branches, M.Sc. in relevant disciplines with valid NET certificate, Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech with a valid GATE score or M.E./M.Tech in Environmental Science/Environmental Engineering/Civil Engineering/Mining Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Biotechnology or any other related branch; OR M.Sc. in Environmental Science/Life Science/Chemistry/Microbiology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology or any other related discipline with a valid NET certificate from CSIR/UGC/ICMR/DBT/ICAR (LS/JRF). Candidates must have a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale. Final-year students/result-awaited candidates may also apply.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000.00 per month (Year 1 & 2) Rs. 42,000.00 per month (Year 3)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

Candidates must have a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale. Final-year students/result-awaited candidates may also apply.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech with a valid GATE score or M.E./M.Tech in relevant engineering branches, or an M.Sc. in relevant science disciplines with a valid NET certificate. A minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000 per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000 per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply by sending their application via email to the address specified in the official notification before the closing date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Are final-year students eligible to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, final-year students or those awaiting their results are eligible to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, provided they meet other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela is a contractual role. The duration of the contract is typically for a specified period, often linked to the project duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
